label: Chemical biostat override
description: Overrides the biostat values from the template for a specific chemical when genes are expanded from a GeneTemplateDef.

chemical.label: Chemical
chemical.description: ChemicalDef whose biostat values are overridden by this entry.

biostatCpx.label: Biostat complexity
biostatCpx.description: Overrides the template-level biostatCpx for this chemical. Omit to inherit the template value.

biostatMet.label: Biostat metabolism
biostatMet.description: Overrides the template-level biostatMet for this chemical. Omit to inherit the template value.

biostatArc.label: Biostat archite
biostatArc.description: Overrides the template-level biostatArc for this chemical. Omit to inherit the template value.
